entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched under the Stocks.exchange name and renamed STEX in September 2018. Later market-data and exchange-status references show no active trading markets or describe the original STEX cryptocurrency exchange as no longer operational, so HEI retains inactive status without assigning an unsupported terminal date.
entity.notes: Stocks.exchange and STEX are treated as one historical exchange identity. The September 2018 rename is recorded as a non-terminal brand event; inactive status reflects the later lack of operational market evidence. Current unrelated uses of the STEX name or ticker are not treated as continuity of this cryptocurrency exchange.

expected.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange originally known as Stocks.exchange and later presented as STEX. Market-data references describe STEX as previously Stocks.exchange and launched around 2017. Current tracker pages show no available markets / no operational trading data or mark the exchange as no longer operational, so HEI models the record as inactive rather than dead.
expected.notes: HEI treats Stocks.exchange and STEX as the same historical exchange record because multiple tracker references describe STEX as previously Stocks.exchange. The record is inactive rather than dead because the evidence set supports no active market data / no longer operational status, but does not establish a clean official terminal shutdown date.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched under the Stocks.exchange name and renamed STEX in September 2018. Later market-data and exchange-status references show no active trading markets or describe the original STEX cryptocurrency exchange as no longer operational, so HEI retains inactive status without assigning an unsupported terminal date.
changes.notes: Stocks.exchange and STEX are treated as one historical exchange identity. The September 2018 rename is recorded as a non-terminal brand event; inactive status reflects the later lack of operational market evidence. Current unrelated uses of the STEX name or ticker are not treated as continuity of this cryptocurrency exchange.

events.title: Stocks.exchange was renamed STEX
events.description: The cryptocurrency exchange changed its public name from Stocks.exchange to STEX in September 2018 while continuing the same trading platform identity.
events.notes: September 1 is used as a month-level marker because the reviewed sources establish September 2018 but not one definitive effective day.

evidence.title: How to download trading history from STEX
evidence.notes: Contemporary service guide states that the exchange name changed from stocks.exchange to STEX in September 2018.

evidence.title: STEX exchange profile
evidence.notes: Profile identifies STEX as previously Stocks.exchange and supports treatment as one historical exchange identity.
